user_intent_summary: Identify routes with anomalous event counts for monitoring and investigation.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Includes route-level columns (departure/arrival airports) and a numeric metric (tot) representing event counts per route. Grouping by route produces multi-record groups for anomaly detection.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Contains route-level columns and a count of alarmed individuals (allarmati), the metric most aligned with anomaly detection for routes.
